expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback BLOCKER 2c (both Claude-Code + Codex reviewers). v0.1.2 emitted Annex III.1(c) high-risk + Article 50(3) transparency; the correct classification is Article 5(1)(f) prohibition (medical/safety carve-out NOT present in input). v0.1.3 adds 'emotion recognition in the workplace' to the f_emotion_in_workplace_education EN lexicon AND extends maxN to 6 so the 5-token phrase matches. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(f).
